sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57242" key="khrugmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κηρυγ-μός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n57242.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κήρυξις</ref></xr>, Sch.Bll.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">21.575</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
